01 About Profile

Languages

I'm an Electrical & Electronics Engineering graduate from Kathmandu University (2025), specializing in Power & Control Systems. My academic and field work has centred on how electricity is generated, distributed, and kept safe — from lab-scale protection relays to a 285 MW hydropower site.

Outside of formal engineering work, I build and fly FPV drones — a hobby that runs on the same fundamentals I studied: power delivery, voltage stability, and signal control, just at a much smaller and faster scale.

I'm currently looking for roles in hydropower generation, transmission, or industrial power systems, and I'm also interested in writing short, practical research notes on power systems topics as I learn.

02 Experience Work History
Jan 2026 — Jun 2026
Electrical Engineer
Upper Tamor Hydropower Project — 285 MW, Phungling, Taplejung
  • Assisted in electrical supervision across the MAT, TRT, Audit Tunnel, Surge Shaft, and Headworks areas of the project.
  • Supported fault identification and restoration work on the NEA dedicated supply line from Hiti Substation, helping improve construction power reliability.
  • Participated in installation and inspection of lighting, power distribution, and temporary construction power systems.
  • Assisted with cable laying, earthing verification, and grounding system checks.
  • Observed testing and commissioning procedures for site electrical equipment.
  • Designed temporary power supply layouts for construction equipment requirements.
Apr 2025 — Aug 2025
Technical Support & Electronics Intern
FPV Mart — Dhapakhel, Lalitpur
  • Diagnosed power system issues related to voltage rating, voltage sag, and current draw in electronic systems.
  • Gained practical exposure to ESC configuration, LiPo battery testing, charging protocols, and electronic system calibration.
2021 — 2025
B.E. — Electrical & Electronics Engineering
Kathmandu University School of Engineering, Dhulikhel
  • Specialization in Power & Control Systems. CGPA: 3.2 / 4.0.
2019 — 2021 / earlier
Higher Secondary & Secondary Education
Gaindakot Science College (CGPA 3.46) · Mukundasen English Boarding School (CGPA 3.85)
03 Key Projects Selected Work
Simulation
Regenerative Braking System — Analysis & Prototype Fabrication

Simulated energy recovery optimization and power loss reduction for electric vehicles using MATLAB/Simulink, and evaluated the impact of regenerative braking on overall vehicle performance and energy conservation.

IoT
Single Phase IoT-Based Energy Meter

Designed and implemented remote monitoring of real-time energy consumption, with wireless communication and cloud data storage.

Embedded
Logic IC-Based Digital Tachometer

Developed a microcontroller-free digital tachometer using logic ICs, with accurate RPM measurement and real-time display.
